rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Clouds (6), so ambiguity asks for careful pacing and better questions is already in play. Clouds often points to uncertainty around the path. At the pivot, Present places Coffin (8) at the center, where a cycle closes to make space for renewal matters most. Here, Coffin emphasizes the part of the old path that has already finished. Looking ahead, Future with Clover (2) points toward small improvements that only matter if acted on quickly, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care. Coffin (8) is the real hinge in this spread. Clouds (6) with Clover (2) keep emphasizing a blend of uncertainty and luck, asking you to name unknowns before choosing direction while staying alert to assuming fortune will remain without effort.
